Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Started list at highway next to the Estadero Popamamba and sede of the consejo for the surrounding communities. We then walked west and crossed the river on the hanging foot bridge to Vereda El Salto--Km 47. We then birded along the railroad tracks parallel to the river. Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Walked east from the town of Termales, reached the "termales spa del pacifico", and then took the Camino Cuatro Encantos. We walked only a few hundred meters along the camino and then turned back. Scouting for Manacus. With Sebastian, Maira, and guides. Ebird track for this list is WAY off due to user error--accidentally continued a list from a previous site. Have since fixed error, except for lingering eBird track.
Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Incidental list at the muelle de Buenaventura. On our way to Termales. With Sebastian.

Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Sendero cuatro encantos. After setting up nets by Phaethornis lek. With Salma. Stopped along trail for breakfast at 930. Walking very slow, doing playback for various species. Recording. Joined at end by Diego, Valentina, Mori, and Callito (Diego had his own list running). Started at nets, walked up trail, ended count back at nets.

Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. El Amargal: camino hasta cuchilla de Arusí. With Armancio as guide. Light rain and super quiet overall. After walking up the trail a few hundred meters we turned back and I ended the list a little short of the El Amargal buildings when it was getting dark.
Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Just east of El Amargal on river trail.

Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. With Armancio as guide, we started at the El Amargal clearing then walked the Camino hasta Cuchilla de Arusí. Ending at clearing near the cuchilla (ridgetop) where we ate breakfast and hung out for a while. Good lighting and open views there for some canopy birds.
Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Seen also by Sebastian.

Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Hike up into the Área de Conservacón Quebrada Pericos--scouting for Manacus. Made it several hundred meters along trail before turning back. Hit one nice flock right where we turned around. Very steep climb up, reaching ~400 meters elevation or a little more.

Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. Started list at highway next to the Estadero Popamamba and sede of the consejo for the surrounding communities. We then walked west and crossed the river on the hanging foot bridge to Vereda El Salto--Km 47. We then birded along the railroad tracks parallel to the river. We then walked back to the highway, walked north along highway, and ended the list near Quebrada Pericos. With Sebastian and Maira.

Manacus2022_Manacus expedition LSU-Humboldt Institute 2022. While standing on balcony of the sede del consejo for the surrounding communities. Balcony overlooked the river and nice swath of trees (including Cecropia) along river. We did this list prior to the official meeting with the board of directors.
